subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Jináb-i-Ghulám-Ḥusayn hath penned a letter and written therein the blessed names of the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی جناب آقا غلامحسین نامه نگاشته و نامهای مبارک یاران مرقوم داشته
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @growth of the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love
